title: dudleya saxosa subsp. collomiae
intro: Dudleya saxosa subsp. collomiae, also known as the San Juan Live Forever, is a succulent plant species that belongs to the Crassulaceae family and is native to the southwestern United States. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Dudleya saxosa subsp. collomiae include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a promising natural remedy for various health conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, or used topically in creams and salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
